description: eCommerce server providing access to eBay marketplace operations including item search, listing management, seller operations, and order processing.

tools.name: search_items
tools.description: Search for items on the eBay marketplace using keywords and optional filters.

keywords.description: Search query terms used to find items on the eBay marketplace.

category_id.description: The eBay category ID used to classify items into specific product taxonomies.

limit.description: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 10, maximum: 100).

sort.description: Sort order for results (e.g., 'bestMatch', 'price' for ascending price, '-price' for descending price).

total.description: Total number of items matching the search criteria.

items.description: List of items matching the search query.

item_id.description: The unique identifier of the eBay item listing.

title.description: The title of the item listing.

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code representing the monetary unit (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

condition.description: The physical condition state of the item (e.g., NEW, USED, REFURBISHED).

username.description: The eBay username of the seller.

listing_url.description: The URL to view the item listing on eBay.

thumbnail.description: URL of the item's thumbnail image.

tools.name: get_item_details
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive details for a specific eBay item listing.

item_id.description: The unique identifier of the eBay item listing.
The unique identifier of the eBay item listing.

title.description: The title of the item listing.

description.description: Detailed text description of the item.

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code representing the monetary unit (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

condition.description: The physical condition state of the item (e.g., NEW, USED, REFURBISHED).

username.description: The eBay username of the seller.

item_specifics.description: Key-value pairs of item attributes and specifications.

return_policy.description: Details of the seller's return policy.

tools.name: create_listing
tools.description: Create a new item listing on eBay for selling products (seller operation).

title.description: The title of the item listing.

description.description: Detailed text description of the item.

category_id.description: The eBay category ID used to classify items into specific product taxonomies.

price.description: The numerical monetary amount for the item price.

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code representing the monetary unit (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

condition.description: The physical condition state of the item (e.g., NEW, USED, REFURBISHED).

quantity.description: Number of items available for sale.

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the created eBay listing.

status.description: Current status of the listing (e.g., ACTIVE, PENDING).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the listing was created.

url.description: The URL to view the created listing on eBay.

tools.name: get_order_details
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific eBay order transaction.

order_id.description: The unique identifier of the eBay order transaction.
The unique identifier of the eBay order transaction.

status.description: Current fulfillment status of the order.

username.description: The eBay username of the buyer.

email.description: Contact email address of the buyer.

items.description: Line items included in the order.

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code representing the monetary unit (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was placed.

tools.name: get_categories
tools.description: Retrieve the category taxonomy for a specific eBay marketplace.

marketplace_id.description: The eBay marketplace ID (e.g., 'EBAY_US', 'EBAY_GB') to retrieve categories for.

categories.description: List of available categories in the marketplace.

category_id.description: The eBay category ID used to classify items into specific product taxonomies.

parent_id.description: Category ID of the parent category in the taxonomy hierarchy.

level.description: Depth level of the category in the taxonomy tree.
